Mentorship from the Industry: Project Ideas Inspired by the Real World

On Monday, December 9, 2024, between 11:00 AM and 12:00 PM, the Management Information Systems Department Advisory Board Meeting took place with the participation of board members and representatives from various companies.

Following this meeting, between 12:00 PM and 1:30 PM, the “Mentorship from the Industry: Project Ideas Inspired by the Real World” Panel was held, with the participation of students, advisory board members, and faculty members. Our Department Chair moderated the panel, Associate Professor Dr. Mehmet Aydın, and our Graduation Projects Coordinator, Lecturer Ebru Dilan.
